title: Ubiquiti UA-Pocket - UniFi Access Pocket Keyfob
category: Ubiquiti UA-Pocket - UniFi Access Pocket Keyfob
description: Highly secure smart NFC tag (13.56 MHz) using multi-layer 128-bit encryption, including proprietary UniFi Access security protocols is used for authentication within the UniFi Access access system . The pendant is resistant to splashing water and dust thanks to IP54 protection. The package contains 10 pendants ISO/IEC 14443 Type A MIFARE DESFire EV2 UniFi Access Proprietary Security Protocol
